# 🤖 Optimus Prime G1 — Fusion 360 Simulation Engine

Welcome to the open-source project that builds a **3D-printable, servo-driven Optimus Prime G1 robot** inside Autodesk Fusion 360.

| What | Link |
|------|------|
| 📖 Full README | [github.com/itsPremkumar/Optimus_Prime](https://github.com/itsPremkumar/Optimus_Prime) |
| 🚀 Quick Start | `git clone https://github.com/itsPremkumar/Optimus_Prime.git && cd Optimus_Prime && python src/run_simulation.py --module robot --capture` |
| 🐛 Report a Bug | [Open an Issue](https://github.com/itsPremkumar/Optimus_Prime/issues/new) |
| 💡 Feature Request | [Suggest a Feature](https://github.com/itsPremkumar/Optimus_Prime/issues/new) |

**Keywords:** Optimus Prime, Transformers G1, Fusion 360, 3D printing, servo robot, kinematic simulation, CAD, STL export, Python
